message:
docs: update architecture diagram, add sidecar node, fix sdk-types svgString

- Architecture diagram now shows .drawmode.ts sidecar as output node
- Regenerated with straight arrows (roundness: null)
- Added missing svgString to render() return type in sdk-types.ts
- Added icon option to ShapeOpts table in SDK reference
- CLAUDE.md updated with current API (local only, not tracked)
